kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=HIS, url=http://192.168.5.19:1600, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC_EPD_HIS_02_SC_02_01 - Creating a patient file without a history

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Start Browser AdmitHis With Token
Open Browser
kw.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Add Cookie
kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.
باز کردن کروم + تزریق کوکی token

kw.name: Go To AdmitHis Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.
رفتن مستقیم به صفحه پذیرش بستری

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Wait For Spinner Hidden
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.
صبر کردن تا loading Angular ناپدید شود

Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Page Contains Element

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Wait For Spinner Hidden
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Identity Inquiry Button Is Enabled
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Verify valid national code can be entered and inquiry button is enabled for Iranian nationality
